use_cases: Search input with dropdown suggestions for tags or categories
Filtering through large lists with autocomplete functionality
Address or location search with real-time suggestions
Product or content search in e-commerce or content platforms
Form input with intelligent suggestion dropdown
ai_summary: A search autocomplete component built with base-ui that provides an input field with a dropdown popup displaying matching suggestions. Features highlighted selection states, keyboard navigation support, and responsive design with dark mode compatibility. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling with clean, flat aesthetics.
